brief_summary_anonymized: Heritage sports club brand re-launch after ownership transfer and difficult period.
strategic_insight: Most brand launches pretend the difficult past didn't happen. Make the difficulty the foundation of the pride. 'We fell. The paddles didn't break.'
execution_summary: Long poetic build → short punch landing. Acknowledge the founding date, the transfer date, the dream, the planning, the break — then the pivot ('You think we stopped? Wrong, we've only just begun'). Jersey reveal at the end.
what_made_it_work: Acknowledging failure before asserting comeback builds credibility
Short punch line after long poetic build is signature Saad/Paradox-Hunter rhythm
Heritage register + paradox flip together: rare combination, distinct posture
what_would_NOT_transplant: Works only when brand has a real comeback story; manufactured comeback rings false
Long-build pacing requires audience patience — short formats fail
